title: Silly Umas
description: Silly mod with meme horses MAMBO
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4900c2b5ad1b1f45331255316d9a2fd71f1a522.png)

**Silly Umas Mod** - is a silly meme mod that adds two meme horse-girls.

Two mobs have been added to the game:
1) Agnes - with custom animations and the ability to craft a summoning egg. If you give her a diamond, her cortisol level will decrease.
2) MAMBO — this mob is simply a meme companion that will cheer you up with “MAMBO!” To summon MAMBO, write “MAMBO” on any sign (it doesn't matter which side) and right-click on it

![agnes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dda7b96bcc2900383156e843983dd1fec136af55.gif)


![Geckolib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8496671bebae4053e5f0c18ee362307bd89187fa.png)
